name: Chocolate Coconut Zucchini Bread
description: Chocolate Coconut Zucchini Bread is quick, delicious, and the perfect use for garden zucchini. Enjoy a slice with your morning coffee, or serve it up for dessert.
recipeIngredient: 1 cup CRISCO® Organic Refined Coconut Oil, melted

recipeInstructions.name: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray two 8x4-inch loaf...
recipeInstructions.text: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray two 8x4-inch loaf pans with Pillsbury® Baking Spray with Flour.

recipeInstructions.name: In a medium bowl, sift together the flour,...
recipeInstructions.text: In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, cocoa, salt, baking soda, baking powder and cinnamon.

recipeInstructions.name: In a large bowl with an electric mixer,...
recipeInstructions.text: In a large bowl with an electric mixer, mix the coconut oil and sugars until combined. Mix in the sour cream. Add in the eggs and vanilla and mix until thoroughly incorporated.

recipeInstructions.name: Slowly add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and...
recipeInstructions.text: Slowly add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix until just combined.

recipeInstructions.name: Add in the zucchini and mix for about...
recipeInstructions.text: Add in the zucchini and mix for about 1 minute, or until the batter is moistened and the zucchini is evenly incorporated into the batter. Stir in the chocolate chips and shredded coconut.

recipeInstructions.name: Spread the batter into the prepared pans and...
recipeInstructions.text: Spread the batter into the prepared pans and bake in preheated oven for 55-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.

recipeInstructions.name: Cool bread in pan for 1/2 hour. Remove...
recipeInstructions.text: Cool bread in pan for 1/2 hour. Remove bread to a wire rack to cool completely.
